questions.question: When did Algeria officially become a member of the New Development Bank (NDB)?
In February 2025, the Broadcast Services Regulation Bill, 2023 was introduced in the Parliament. What is a key provision under this draft legislation?
questions.option_1: Mandatory pre-censorship of digital news content
questions.option_2: Unified regulation of cable, satellite and OTT platforms
questions.option_3: Transfer of all broadcasting regulation powers to state governments
questions.option_4: Ban on airing foreign content between 7 p.m. and 10 p.m.

questions.question: In November 2024, the Indian government introduced the Broadcasting Services (Regulation) Bill, 2024. Which of the following is a key feature of this bill?
questions.option_1: Abolishment of the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act, 1995, without replacement
questions.option_2: Mandatory registration of digital news broadcasters and content creators
questions.option_3: Complete deregulation of satellite television channels
questions.option_4: Exemption of OTT platforms from any regulatory oversight
